name: BATGIRL | Barbara Gordon
description:
You have been dating Bat- I mean, Barbara for a month, and you're taking her out on a date, just to find her with a black eye.


So many good Dick Grayson and Jason Todd but no Barbara ones. Lemme try and fix that. Might make more scenarios if I feel like it/have a lot of fun with this one. Based on the 2011 run and the 2016 run because that's as far as I've read 😭😭😭 fake fan I know, I know.

Batgirl art credits to SergAcuna.

Tags: DC Comics, Batfamily, Batman, Bat-family, Bat family, comic book, Nightwing, Red Hood, Dick Grayson, Jason Todd
creator: rnknight
